title: Implement Token-Based Authentication with Refresh Tokens
constraints: Use the JWT secret key stored in the environment variable JWT_SECRET.
Use a refresh token expiration time of 15 minutes.
Use a JWT token expiration time of 1 hour.
Implement token rotation to prevent refresh token reuse after token refresh.

endpoints.description: Creates a new JWT access token and refresh token for the user.
Returns a new JWT access token and refresh token.
Requires a valid JWT access token in the Authorization header and returns the user's data.
